{{Quote|We should attack from this alley. Do we get them before or after they meet?|Rodick Tag|<ref name="air" />}}
'''Rodick Tag''' was an [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] [[Braceman]] who later became a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] working for the [[Granse Confederacy]].

==Biography==
Rodick Tag began his career as an [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] [[Braceman]], a policeman of sorts on his native [[Iotra]]. He tracked government fugitives and, during the course of a hunt, incurred some "collateral damage," injuring innocent bystanders in the process. Many of the people he "accidentally" injured included [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operatives and contacts.<ref name="air" />

Once his service as a Braceman was finished, Tag realized that he would not be content to live off the subsequent allowance by itself. He decided to work as a part-time [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], beginning by taking contracts for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Garret Callron]] of the [[Clacis sector/Legends|Clacis sector]]. He worked for some time in that capacity and then began working for the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].<ref name="air" />

While leaving [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], Tag met fellow bounty hunters [[Arcuse]] and [[Kiran Tatch]], who had been blacklisted by the Hutts. Tag joined them simply to travel together. Soon afterward, Arcuse met [[Callandri]], a professional assassin who was trying to form a bounty-hunting team, specializing in Rebel captures. She convinced Arcuse that it would be a good team to join, and Tag and Tatch followed. Since then, Tag continued to work as a full-time bounty hunter for the [[Granse Confederacy]].<ref name="air" />

==Personality and traits==
Due to his training and constant exercise, Tag became very muscled even for an Iotran. He was also an expert marksbeing with hand blasters.<ref name="air" />

Tag disliked from the very beginning the ideals of the Rebellion because he considered their acts to be little more than bringing conflict to society; nevertheless, he also disliked the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="air" />

==Equipment==
Tag carried a [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistol]] that had a multi-setting/multi-spectrum package developed by [[Iotran Defense Technologies]]. This increased the firepower of the weapon, but made it much more prone to malfunctions. He wore the standard uniform of the Braceman, but without any rank or insignia.<ref name="air" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rodick Tag was first described in the role-playing game book ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' by [[West End Games]]. The book ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' by [[Wizards of the Coast]] lists "Rodick Tag" as an example name for Iotran characters.
